login.subtitle: Log in to continue to your account
login.emailNotConfirmedBody: We sent a confirmation link to your email when you signed up. Check your inbox (and spam folder) and click the link before logging in.

signup.subtitle: Join thousands of buyers and sellers
signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
signup.checkEmailBodyPrefix: We sent a confirmation link to
signup.checkEmailBodySuffix: Verify your email to activate your account.

buyer.title: Items
buyer.noItemsYet: No items have been added yet.

seller.dragDropText: Drag a photo here, or choose below

settings.title: Settings
settings.emailNote: Changing your email will require verification via a confirmation link.
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
settings.deleteAccountNote: To permanently delete your account, please contact support.
settings.deleteAccountWarning: This will permanently delete your account, all your listings, messages, favorites, and cart — this cannot be undone.

dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.noItemsYet: You haven't added any items yet.
dashboard.deleteConfirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete "
dashboard.deletePermissionError: Delete failed — you likely don't have permission to delete this item. Check the RLS policy in Supabase.
dashboard.vipTestModeNotice: ⚠️ Test mode: the real payment system isn't active yet. Confirming updates the expiry directly, without charging any money.

about.heroSubtitle: Marketologi was built with one simple goal — to make buying and selling direct, transparent, and human. We believe that trading without middlemen or hidden fees is simply more efficient.
about.missionP1: We are fighting against digital noise — spam, unrealistic prices, and endless waiting. Marketologi isn't just a listings board; it's a space for those who value their time, quality, and direct contact.
about.missionP2: Marketologi is not just a place for ads — it is a platform for serious buyers and sellers for whom time and quality are of the utmost importance.
about.value1Text: No middlemen — buyers and sellers deal directly, on their own terms.
about.value2Text: Clear prices, full descriptions, and real photos — no surprises.
about.value3Text: Every piece of feedback helps us make Marketologi fairer and simpler for everyone.
about.step1Text: Browse items by category or search.
about.step2Text: Tap "Show Number" and call the seller directly.
about.step3Text: Agree on price, delivery, and payment directly, however works best for you.
about.ctaSubtitle: Join Marketologi today — buy or sell in just a few minutes.

footer.tagline: A marketplace built on genuine trust.
